channel.title: Tech
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Tech, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Uber CTO Praveen Neppalli Naga joins stacked StrictlyVC SF lineup for April 30 event
item.description: Surprise! StrictlyVC San Francisco, which will kick off this year’s events lineup for TechCrunch on April 30 at the Sentro Filipino Cultural Center, i...

item.title: Nothing introduces an AI-powered dictation tool
item.description: Nothing's new on-device dictation tool supports over 100 languages.

item.title: Another spyware maker caught distributing fake Android snooping apps
item.description: Researchers have found a new case where government authorities used a fake Android app to plant spyware on a target’s phone. The company that allegedl...

item.title: DeepSeek previews new AI model that ‘closes the gap’ with frontier models
item.description: DeepSeek says both models are more efficient and performant than DeepSeek V3.2 due to architectural improvements, and have almost "closed the gap" wit...

item.title: In another wild turn for AI chips, Meta signs deal for millions of Amazon AI CPUs
item.description: Meta has commandeered a big chunk of Amazon's homegrown CPUs (not GPUs) for AI agentic workloads, signaling that a new kind of chip race has begun.
